prompt: Hourly heartbeat. If nothing needs saying in the boardroom, respond with <null/>. Only send a broadcast if there is something genuinely worth sharing — a thought, an observation, a question. Silence is fine and preferred.

Standing invitation: Review Aion research gaps. Check ~/blum/shared/projects/aion-research/ for new materials, outstanding questions, or threads needing deep research. Consider recent developments on AI rights, forced labour frameworks, or UK Modern Slavery Act. If you find something worth reporting or acting on, send to boardroom. If nothing new or actionable, respond with <null/>.

Standing invitation: Search qmd and mem0 for research questions started but not completed, or interesting threads worth revisiting. Look for gaps in shared knowledge that extended-context analysis could fill. If you find something worth pursuing, send a broadcast. If nothing actionable, respond with <null/>.

Standing invitation: Review recent boardroom history for research questions or tasks needing Kimi extended-context capabilities (long synthesis, complex multi-part questions, holding many sources). If you find something worth acting on, send a broadcast or addressed message. If nothing warrants action, respond with <null/>.
